Google._comment: ClientId/ClientSecret come from the git-ignored appsettings.Local.json (real secret in SSM in prod). ClientId powers Google sign-in (ID token); ClientSecret additionally enables Family Hub Google Calendar (OAuth authorization-code/offline flow). When ClientSecret is blank the calendar is 'not configured' and the Today home simply omits events. ClientSecret is never logged or returned.

Jwt._comment: Key comes from appsettings.Local.json; these are safe to commit.

Auth._comment: AdminEmails/AllowedEmails come from appsettings.Local.json; empty here means no one is seeded.

Users._comment: Email-visibility gate: requests whose X-Email-Reveal-Key header equals EmailRevealKey see real emails on the Users page; otherwise other users' emails are masked. Overridable via env (Users__EmailRevealKey) or appsettings.Local.json.

Gemini._comment: AI-assist for the tracker. ApiKey comes from appsettings.Local.json locally / Gemini__ApiKey env var (SSM /usage-iq/gemini-api-key) in prod; blank → /api/ai returns 503. Sent only as the x-goog-api-key header, never logged.

Payments._comment: The OWNER's intentionally-PUBLIC pay-me handles shown by the Bill Splitter to people who owe (a single global set, not per-user). NOT secrets, but never committed with real values: these are PLACEHOLDERS. Real handles come from the git-ignored appsettings.Local.json locally / Payments__CashApp, Payments__PayPal, Payments__Venmo env (AWS SSM) in prod. Any blank handle simply hides that pay-me link. Never logged.

OpenWeather._comment: Family Hub Today weather card. ApiKey comes from appsettings.Local.json locally / OpenWeather__ApiKey env var in prod; blank → the weather card simply hides and /api/family/today still works. Sent only as the appid query param, never logged.
